wine_museums.name: Kloster Eberbach Monastery and Wine Cellar Museum
wine_museums.address: Kloster Eberbach, 65346 Eltville am Rhein, Germany
wine_museums.description: The 1136 Cistercian abbey above Eltville with cloisters, dormitory, refectory and historic wine cellars. Tours present Cistercian viticulture and the abbey's role as cradle of Rheingau Riesling.
wine_museums.admission: Monastery entry with tour and tasting ticket options; combined Vinothek tasting flights

wine_museums.name: Hochheimer Weinbaumuseum
wine_museums.description: Town wine-growing museum in a 1902 vaulted cellar in Hochheim am Main, opened 2010. Three rooms trace vineyard work, grape pressing and bottling, with special focus on Sekt production begun in Hochheim in 1832.
wine_museums.admission: Standard admission EUR 2; museum wine evenings on the third Sunday of the month

wine_museums.name: Asbach Visitor Centre
wine_museums.address: Ingelheimer Strasse 4, 65385 Ruedesheim am Rhein, Germany
wine_museums.description: Visitor centre and museum of the Asbach Weinbrand house founded 1892. Tours and exhibits present the production of Asbach Uralt brandy, from distillation through oak ageing, with tastings of the current range.
wine_museums.admission: Guided tour with film, demonstration and tasting; pre-booked Saturdays at 10:00

wine_museums.name: Schloss Johannisberg Bibliotheca Subterranea
wine_museums.description: Cellar museum at Schloss Johannisberg housing 25,000 wine bottles with the oldest from 1748. The Bibliotheca Subterranea forms part of the cellar built around 1100 by Benedictine monks above Geisenheim.
wine_museums.admission: Cellar tour with tasting bookable for groups; Vinothek open daily

wine_museums.name: Georg Mueller Stiftung Art Cellar
wine_museums.description: Art-and-wine museum in the 250-year-old cellar of the Georg Mueller Stiftung estate in Hattenheim, with 1,400 square metres of vaulted cellar housing a contemporary art collection alongside the working winery.
wine_museums.admission: Cellar visits and art-cellar tours by arrangement; Vinothek open during shop hours
